あら、お兄様。お兄様も、噂を聞いて、<br>わたくしの芸術を味わいに来たのですか:
Oh, Onii. Have you also heard the rumors and come to taste my
artwork?
こうやって、小さな薔薇の氷像をグラスに入れて、<br>お酒を注いだだけなんですけ: I simply placed a small ice rose in a glass and poured liquor over it.
え？ 折角の芸術作品がすぐに溶けてしまって勿体ない、ですって？<br>はぁ……ま:
What? You say it's a waste that the precious artwork will melt away
quickly? *sigh*... Honestly, such a plebeian way of thinking.
この氷の薔薇は、美しい花が儚く散るからこそ価値がある……。<br>その一瞬の煌め:
This ice rose has value precisely because the beautiful flower
vanishes so fleetingly... It is a work of art meant to be savored for that momentary sparkle.
ひゃっ！？ ちょ、ちょっとお兄様、何をなさってるの！<br>氷を噛み砕くのはダメ:
Eek! W-Wait, Onii, what are you doing! Don't crunch the ice! That'll
ruin the artwork!
